# Markdown Conventions

## File Naming

- MUST use `kebab-case.md` for all new files (lowercase letters, hyphens, `.md` extension)
- MUST use `snake_case` or `{NNN}_{slug}` for directories
- NEVER use spaces, uppercase, or special characters in file or directory names

## Header Hierarchy

- MUST use `#` hash symbols for headers (NOT `**bold**` or underline formatting)
- MUST follow logical hierarchy — never skip levels (H1 → H2 → H3)
- MUST have a blank line between headers and content
- Single space required between hash symbols and header text

## Code Blocks

- MUST specify language on all fenced code blocks
- Use `bash` for shell commands, `json` for JSON, `yaml` for YAML, `mermaid` for diagrams
- Use `text` for plain text content without syntax highlighting
- Blank line before and after code blocks

## Frontmatter (for structured docs under `docs/`)

Required fields: `title`, `description`, `version`, `status`, `category`, `updated`, `authors`
Valid status values: `draft`, `review`, `stable`, `deprecated`

## Mermaid Diagrams

- MUST use `\`\`\`mermaid` for all system diagrams
- Prefer `flowchart LR` for service dependency flows
- Use `sequenceDiagram` for event/message flows
- Prefer `C4Context` for system-level architecture

## Cross-References

- MUST use proper relative markdown links: `[Section](./path/to/file.md#section)`
- NEVER reference documents by name alone without a link
- Use anchor links for section references

## Evidence Labels (RCA/Analysis Docs)

- `A1 FACT` — externally witnessed: file:line, command + captured output, or URL
- `A2 INFER` — derived from A1s via named reasoning
- `A3 UNVERIFIED[blocked: reason]` — not re-probed; blocking reason named

## Spacing

- No trailing whitespace
- Maximum one consecutive blank line
- Blank line required before and after headings
- Blank line required before and after code blocks
